title: Organisation
description: Usually a network of several libraries sharing data for patrons, items, etc.

current_budget_pid.title: Current ID of the budget
current_budget_pid.description: The ID of the current budget of the organisation

default_currency.title: Default currency
default_currency.description: The default currency of the organisation

online_harvested_source.title: Online harvested sources
online_harvested_source.description: Online harvested sources as configured in ebooks server.

patron_cleanup.title: Patron cleanup configuration
patron_cleanup.description: Configuration for the automatic deletion of inactive patron profiles.

expiration_years.title: Expiration threshold (years)
expiration_years.description: Only delete patrons whose expiration_date is older than this many years ago.

inactivity_years.title: Inactivity threshold (years)
inactivity_years.description: Only delete patrons whose user last logged in more than this many years ago.

excluded_patron_types.title: Excluded patron types
excluded_patron_types.description: List of patron type PIDs to exclude from automatic deletion.
